msg: User described Oikos: 8-module home management app - pantry, recipes, finance, financing, shopping list, spending analysis, investment, plant/gardening. Server app + web frontend. Claude API for AI features.
project.md populated with full brief from user description.
Spawned Tech Specialist for architecture and feasibility assessment of all 8 Oikos modules
Spawned Researcher for API landscape, integrations, and existing OSS tools research
Tech Specialist completed feasibility spec — FastAPI+PostgreSQL+SvelteKit proposed, 6 risks identified, 7 open questions raised
Researcher completed integrations report — Open Food Facts, Perenual, bankstatementparser, reference OSS apps documented
Stack revised: Node.js+Express, React+Vite+MUI, PostgreSQL, Docker Compose. Claude via claude -p CLI subprocess (no SDK). Finance import file-based only.
Confirmed: TypeScript throughout, Prisma ORM, Vite as Express middleware (single server service on port 3001), MUI+Material Icons, mobile-first.
Spawned Tech Specialist to produce architecture.md, specs/00-foundation.md, specs/01-pantry.md
Architecture and first two implementation specs produced. Stack revised to TypeScript+Prisma+Vite middleware based on reference project files.
Pantry v1: manual entry only (name, size/unit, quantity, expiry). Barcode scanning deferred as optional enhancement pending OQ-3 (HTTPS).
Project management structure created: roadmap.md, backlog.md, open-questions.md. Template project created. new-project.sh simplified to cp -r template.
project.md rewritten with correct scope (non-technical brief only). Template project.md updated to remove overlapping sections.
Developer CLAUDE.md updated: app code goes in projects/<name>/app/, workspace is for worker artifacts only. app/ folder added to template and oikos project.
Planning phase complete. Ready for implementation. Next: spawn Developer for Phase 0 (Foundation) — scaffold app/ per docs/specs/00-foundation.md.
OQ-6 closed: project.md already states single-user only (Alex), no multi-user support in v1. Auth design unchanged.

Pantry spec conflicts resolved: (1) no model.ts files — DB queries go in service per architecture.md; (2) Prisma models replace raw SQL migrations; (3) all files .ts not .js; (4) path is server/ not backend/; (5) OFF integration goes in services/openFoodFacts.ts.
Code documentation approach: inline why-comments written during coding (not a separate pass). Comment only when WHY is non-obvious — hidden constraints, workarounds, security decisions.

Spawned Developer for Phase 0 foundation + Phase 1 pantry backend. Scope: all server-side files, Prisma schema with Product+PantryItem, pantry routes/controller/service, OFF integration, shared types. No frontend components.

Developer completed Phase 0 + Phase 1 backend — 26 files written to app/. Notable: $queryRawUnsafe used for listItems (Prisma typed API cannot combine dynamic WHERE with computed SQL column days_until_expiry in one pass; fully parameterised).
Session resumed. User confirmed Oikos is the active project. Phase 0 server + Phase 1 pantry backend already complete from prior session. Next: Phase 0 client scaffold + Phase 1 pantry UI.

Spawned Developer for Phase 0 client scaffold (theme, authStore, themeStore, AppShell, LoginPage, routing) + Phase 1 pantry frontend (PantryOverview, ScanPage, AddEditItem, ProductDetail, ExpiryBadge, pantry API module). zxing-wasm, @mui/x-date-pickers, dayjs added as deps.

Developer completed 15 client source files. Phase 0: theme, authStore, themeStore, axios client, AppShell, LoginPage, routing. Phase 1: pantry API module, ExpiryBadge, PantryOverview, ScanPage (ZXing-WASM), AddEditItem (DatePicker), ProductDetail. tsconfig.json also created. Known gap: product_id filter on list endpoint not implemented on backend.
Phase 0 (full stack) and Phase 1 Pantry (full stack) are complete. App is ready for first run. Next: docker compose up, npm install, verify boot and end-to-end flow.

Session closed. Phase 0 (full stack) and Phase 1 Pantry (full stack) are complete — 17 client files written. Next session: docker compose up --build, first run verification, then define Phase 2 module spec.
Spawned developer to review 15 new client source files for non-obvious inline comments (handoff step).
6 files received targeted inline comments: themeStore.ts, pantry.ts, AppShell.tsx, PantryOverviewPage.tsx, ScanPage.tsx, AddEditItemPage.tsx. 9 files needed no additions.
